_publications._publicationTitle: Multidimensional Immunotyping of Human NF1-Associated Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors Uncovers Tumor-Associated Macrophages as Key Drivers of Immune Evasion in the Tumor Microenvironment.

_contextSnippet: Dendritic cells were determined by CD11c surface marker and tumor-associated macrophages (TAM) by CD163 surface marker. There were statistically significant increases of both infiltrating dendritic cells (p<0.0001)
details: Successfully detected dendritic cells with statistically significant increases from benign to malignant PNST (p<0.0001); median density of 157.5 cells/mm² in malignant tumors
